data.title: Is Binance Still Relevant? ALPACA Crypto Blasts +65% Without Binance Support
data.description:
Drama over the past few weeks saw Binance de-list ALPACA crypto from the exchange, with the token suspiciously shooting up over 20x leading into the de-listing date. Many within the crypto community called foul play by Binance, believing its market makers were pumping and dumping the coin, extracting as much liquidity as possible from ALPACA.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/presales/is-binance-still-relevant-alpaca-crypto-blasts-65-without-binance-support/

data.title: Intel, Nvidia, and AMD Stocks Rise Amid AI Chip Policy Shift
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Intel shares increased by 2.86%, Nvidia by 1.85%, and AMD by 1.28% in pre-market trading on May 8. This rise follows the announcement by U.S. President Donald Trump's administration of plans to lift AI chip restrictions imposed during the Biden era.

data.title: Can you mine Bitcoin with a gaming PC? Here’s what you need to know
data.description:
Is your gaming PC capable of mining crypto? As of May 2025, Bitcoin mining is looking attractive again. With Bitcoin (BTC) trading around $95,000 and transaction fees hitting new highs after the 2024 halving, mining rewards — though smaller — are worth chasing. From home setups to industrial-scale farms, the question of whether Bitcoin mining is profitable is back in the spotlight. And if you’re a gamer, chances are you’ve looked at your rig and wondered: Can a gaming PC mine crypto? After all, modern gaming computers are packed with powerful GPUs, solid cooling and lots of downtime, especially if you’re not gaming daily
source: https://cointelegraph.com/explained/can-you-mine-bitcoin-with-a-gaming-pc?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Abraxas Capital deposited 1,000 BTC into Kraken, and may have realized a profit of over $14 million
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, according to The Data Nerd, about two hours ago, a wallet belonging to Abraxas Capital Management deposited 1,000 BTC into Kraken, which is equivalent to about $98.92 million at the current price. The address opened a position of this batch of BTC at an average price of $84,713 three weeks ago. If all were sold, it would realize a profit of about $14.21 million. Currently, the address still holds 983 BTC, worth about $97.43 million.

data.description:
Leaders of the Group of Seven (G7) are expected to raise the issue of North Korea’s growing cyberattacks and cryptocurrency thefts at their upcoming summit.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/g7-may-address-north-koreas-crypto-thefts-at-june-summit/

data.title: Ethereum Governance Process Proposed for Improvement
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum core developer Tim Beiko has introduced a proposal aimed at enhancing the governance process of Ethereum. The proposal focuses on optimizing the selection of hard fork 'flagship features.' Key elements of the proposal include defining clear fork objectives, limiting each layer to a maximum of one flagship feature, employing a 'barbell' strategy to strengthen community feedback, formalizing working groups, and documenting the governance process. This initiative seeks to improve transparency and decision-making legitimacy while maintaining Ethereum's community-driven nature.

data.title: Monad Testnet Sees Decline in Daily Active Accounts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain data reveals a significant drop in the daily active accounts on the Monad testnet since the beginning of May. The number of active accounts peaked at 9.77 million on April 30, but in the past five days, this figure has stabilized around 1 million.

data.title: Governor Hobbs greenlights Arizona’s Bitcoin reserve fund after signing HB-2749 into law
data.description:
Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs signed a bill into law allowing the U. S. state to keep unclaimed crypto and establish a 'Bitcoin Reserve Fund' not using taxpayers’ funds.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arizonas-bitcoin-reserve-fund/
